author: SantiMod
content:
Hello community!  We are looking for moderators for the Star Atlas Discord server! 

Please fill out this form if you are interested in the position, we will review all the applications and contact those who are most suitable for the position. 

Thank you!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1KMLRAeZGzUfXe0aK0da24SZZL8GtUYCUUnfZKYVtdJk/edit

Note: The information collected will never be shared and will only be viewed by the Star Atlas team.
